# Feature: Adapter UI Styleguide — Vue, Angular, Svelte

<!-- auto-generated by /implement on 2026-07-08 -->

## Intent
Port React Help Widget styleguide (tokens, ReviewBadge, FlowStepList, loading/empty/error, ESC/focus) to `@iamthamanic/autoguide-vue`, `@iamthamanic/autoguide-angular`, and `@iamthamanic/autoguide-svelte`.

## Preconditions
- `@iamthamanic/autoguide-ui` provides `agTokenCssVars`, `getReviewBadgeState`, `listOrderedFlowSteps`, `bindFocusTrap`
- React reference: `.qa/acceptance/ui-styleguide-react-widget.md`

## Happy Path
- [x] Vue widget uses `--ag-*` tokens and shared headless primitives
- [x] Angular widget uses `--ag-*` tokens and shared headless primitives
- [x] Svelte widget uses `--ag-*` tokens and shared headless primitives
- [x] FlowStepList shows numbered ordered steps per flow
- [x] ReviewBadge shows dev-only confidence label with provenance title
- [x] Loading state shows PanelSkeleton and `aria-busy` on panel
- [x] Empty state shows German copy and dev-mode review CLI hint
- [x] Error state shows German message and Retry when `onRetry` set
- [x] ESC closes panel; focus trap cycles Tab within open panel
- [x] Close button (`×`) dismisses panel

## Edge Cases
- [x] Published mode hides uncertain facts and dev badges
- [x] Provider accepts optional `loading`, `error`, `onRetry` on all three adapters

## Regression
- [x] Vue `widget.test.ts` parity tests pass
- [x] Angular `widget.test.ts` parity tests pass
- [x] Svelte `widget.test.ts` parity tests pass
- [x] React `useFocusTrap` delegates to `bindFocusTrap` from `@iamthamanic/autoguide-ui`

## Assumptions
- Inspector overlay parity deferred (React-only tokens/ESC already done in #82 slice)
- Tokens injected via inline CSS variables on widget root (no separate CSS build per adapter)

## Implementation Notes
- `packages/ui/src/focus-trap.ts` — `bindFocusTrap`
- `plugins/vue/src/` — ReviewBadge, FlowStepList, PanelSkeleton, useFocusTrap
- `plugins/angular/src/` — review-badge, flow-step-list, panel-skeleton components
- `plugins/svelte/src/` — ReviewBadge, FlowStepList, PanelSkeleton Svelte components
- Providers extended with `loading`, `error`, `onRetry`
